entity.label: Raamah
entity.subtitle: Region
entity.description: A country which traded with Tyre (Ezek. 27:22).

nodes.label: Raamah
nodes.description: A country which traded with Tyre (Ezek. 27:22).

verses.text: The merchants of Sheba and Raamah, they were thy merchants: they occupied in thy fairs with chief of all spices, and with all precious stones, and gold.
